g.text: Electrical holds 34 of 109 open items, the largest single backlog
Cumulative progress reached 63% in August, 9 points behind plan
Forecast lands 18 points over budget; logistics drives two thirds of the overrun
Casta moved from third to first in two quarters
Docs on time misses target by 14 points; deliveries close the gap
One lot sits at 62 days, twice the next slowest
Road carries 70 of 130 loads; barge stays marginal
Two of five KPIs move the wrong way this week
Output ran 8% under plan at the June trough
The corridor is 55% complete, past the river crossing
